# Creative asset brief

Use this template before asking Codex to generate SVG/logo concepts, ChatGPT UI prompts, showcase pages, or UI creative assets.

## Task card

- Goal:
- Target repo / product:
- Intended asset type: logo / icon / hero image / empty state / marketing visual / UI mock / other
- Constraints:
- Non-goals:
- Done criteria:
- Verification commands or visual checks:

## Product and audience

- Brand / product name:
- Industry / category:
- Audience:
- Primary user goal:
- Business or product rule:
- Where the asset will appear:

## Creative direction

- Core concept:
- Visual thesis:
- Mood: cold / warm / professional / friendly / playful / technical / other
- Style: minimal / complex / geometric / organic / editorial / product-photo / illustration / other
- Color preference:
- Typography preference:
- Materials or textures:
- References or inspirations:
- Must include:
- Must avoid:

## Output contract

- Required outputs: SVG / HTML showcase / ChatGPT UI prompt / PNG/JPG returned by user / screenshot evidence
- Suggested paths:
  - Brief:
  - Prompt handoff:
  - SVG/HTML:
  - Returned bitmap:
  - Verification screenshot:
- Manual ChatGPT UI step required? yes / no
- API live call allowed? default: no

## State and UX coverage

For UI-embedded assets, state whether each is relevant:

- default:
- hover:
- focus-visible:
- active:
- loading:
- empty:
- error:
- disabled:
- success:

## Verification evidence

- Browser / screenshot / Playwright / agent-browser command:
- Observed result:
- Console/network notes:
- Responsive or accessibility notes:
- Remaining visual gaps:
